must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet: Proposed acquisition by Siam Cascade PCL (SET: SCSD) of 51% of Bamboo Harbor Logistics Co., Ltd., a Thai private company limited, via secondary share purchase
Purchase Price: THB 2,150,000,000; consideration: 80% cash at closing, 20% deferred note (12 months, THBFIX + 210 bps); target net cash/debt true-up at T+90
Embargo: no disclosure to media, analysts, or vendors before 2026-08-15 09:00 ICT per S E C ( T h a i l a n d ) guidance and SET immediate disclosure rules
Signing/Closing: execution of Definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) by 2026-06-30; closing within 60 days, subject to Board and shareholder approvals under the Public Limited Companies Act
Financing: underwritten bridge facility of THB 1,500,000,000 from Ocean Lily Bank, Ltd.; covenants include net debt/EBITDA ≤ 3.0x and dividend stopper during bridge period

Regulatory/Exchange: disclosure on SET portal within T+1 of signing; tender offer analysis if post-closing holding triggers 25% threshold under Thai takeover rules; no foreign dominance issues expected
